description: IntegratedS3 production overview for Prometheus-backed OpenTelemetry metrics. Queries use regex metric selectors to tolerate Prometheus normalization such as dots becoming underscores, optional counter _total suffixes, and histogram/gauge unit suffixes like _ms, _milliseconds, and _seconds.

panels.description: HTTP requests per second from integrateds3.http.request.count.
panels.title: Request rate

panels.description: HTTP 5xx responses per second from integrateds3.http.request.count.
panels.title: HTTP 5xx rate

panels.description: 95th percentile request latency from integrateds3.http.request.duration.
panels.title: p95 HTTP latency

panels.description: 95th percentile storage latency from integrateds3.storage.operation.duration.
panels.title: p95 storage latency

panels.description: Unique providers currently reporting unhealthy backend health status.
panels.title: Unhealthy backend count

panels.description: Current outstanding replica repair backlog from integrateds3.replication.backlog.size.
panels.title: Outstanding repair backlog

panels.description: Throughput by IntegratedS3 operation from integrateds3.http.request.count.
panels.title: Requests/sec by operation

panels.description: p50 / p95 / p99 request duration percentiles from integrateds3.http.request.duration.
panels.title: Request duration percentiles

panels.description: Authentication failure rate from integrateds3.http.authentication.failures.
panels.title: Auth failure rate by auth type/stage

panels.description: HTTP response rate by status code from integrateds3.http.request.count.
panels.title: Requests by status code

panels.description: Total HTTP throughput from integrateds3.http.bytes_received and integrateds3.http.bytes_sent.
panels.title: Total Throughput (bytes/sec)

panels.description: Upload throughput by operation from integrateds3.http.bytes_received.
panels.title: Upload Throughput by Operation

panels.description: Download throughput by operation from integrateds3.http.bytes_sent.
panels.title: Download Throughput by Operation

panels.description: Total bytes transferred over the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Data Transferred

panels.description: Operation throughput from integrateds3.storage.operation.count.
panels.title: Storage operations/sec by result/operation

panels.description: 95th percentile latency by provider kind from integrateds3.storage.operation.duration.
panels.title: Storage latency p95 by provider kind

panels.description: Failure rate by storage error code from integrateds3.storage.operation.count.
panels.title: Storage failures by error code

panels.description: Authorization failure rate from integrateds3.storage.authorization.failures.
panels.title: Storage authorization failures

panels.description: 95th percentile disk-provider latency from integrateds3.disk.operation.duration.
panels.title: Disk provider latency p95

panels.description: Disk provider error rate from integrateds3.disk.operation.errors.
panels.title: Disk provider errors

panels.description: 95th percentile S3-provider latency from integrateds3.s3.operation.duration.
panels.title: S3 provider latency p95

panels.description: S3 provider error rate from integrateds3.s3.operation.errors.
panels.title: S3 provider errors

panels.description: Outstanding replica repair backlog from integrateds3.replication.backlog.size.
panels.title: Backlog size by replica backend + status

panels.description: Oldest outstanding backlog age from integrateds3.replication.backlog.oldest_age.
panels.title: Oldest backlog age by replica backend

panels.description: 95th percentile repair duration from integrateds3.replication.repair.duration.
panels.title: Repair duration p95

panels.description: Minimum observed backend health state across the selected instances. Values: 1=healthy, 0=unhealthy, -1=unknown.
panels.title: Backend health status by provider

panels.description: 95th percentile duration from integrateds3.maintenance.job.duration.
panels.title: Maintenance job duration p95 by job

panels.description: Failure rate from integrateds3.maintenance.job.failures.
panels.title: Maintenance job failures

panels.description: XML protocol parse error rate from integrateds3.protocol.xml.parse_errors.
panels.title: XML parse errors

panels.description: Signature verification error rate from integrateds3.protocol.signature.errors.
panels.title: Signature errors

title: IntegratedS3 Overview
